Discord server! Join up!

вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”вҖ”

Just saw the last episode for MHA season 7 and the cutoff was really confusing. There was NO need to split it into another season, especially not in the middle of a fight.

And I donвҖҷt know how theyвҖҷre gonna start the next season. I donвҖҷt wanna spoil things but anyone whoвҖҷs read the manga will know that itвҖҷs just fighting immediately after where they stopped, plus some huge stuff that would be in early episodes.

And would the rest of the manga even have enough content for a whole season? I know a lot happens but I donвҖҷt see how it could be an entire season, unless they add more to the ending.

Overall an alright season though, some parts felt very lackluster but things got better towards the end.

Tsuyu bot next and then Akaza.

Voted for the scenario in the discord, I sometimes do polls for parts of the next bot so join if you wanna see that.
